potions.Name: Vital Tonic
potions.Effect: Restore health equal to half the target's level (rounded up).

potions.Name: Charging Serum
potions.Effect: Target gains +2 movement for one turn.

potions.Name: Flux Draft
potions.Effect: Apply 1 Poison, 1 Mantra, 1 Stun, 1 Haste, 1 Guard. Target takes 1 damage and gains 1 Grace.

potions.Name: Zeal Potion
potions.Effect: Gain bonus melee damage equal to Might modifier until end of turn.

potions.Name: Arcane Elixir
potions.Effect: Restore mana equal to half the target's level (rounded up).

potions.Name: Vitality Resonant
potions.Effect: Restore health equal to target's level.

potions.Name: Xoliratos
potions.Effect: Negate 2 Exhaustion until next rest.

potions.Name: Friot Toxin
potions.Effect: Apply 3 Poison (clearly harmful).

potions.Name: Zanetohelav
potions.Effect: Next attack grants Guard equal to damage dealt, lasting until end of combat. Persists until hit.

potions.Name: Venediction
potions.Effect: Remove all conditions (persistent sources immediately reapply).

potions.Name: Overcharge Beverage
potions.Effect: Remove Slow stacks; gain +1 Reaction, +4 Reflex, +2 Movement for the scene.

potions.Name: Rekolesence
potions.Effect: Blind target and double movement until end of turn.

potions.Name: Lamifonistation
potions.Effect: After dealing damage, may move tiles equal to damage dealt.

potions.Name: Fanlaneries
potions.Effect: Teleport within range equal to Movement +2.

potions.Name: Atherflux
potions.Effect: All level-based effects treat target as Level 12.

potions.Name: Zelt Imonoratu
potions.Effect: Swap Range and Armor until start of next turn.

potions.Name: Maddening Sap
potions.Effect: Apply Madness until end of combat.

potions.Name: Brew of Fury
potions.Effect: Enter Rage, intoxicated, +1 melee damage for 2 turns.

potions.Name: Amourius
potions.Effect: Next attack damage type is predetermined at brewing.

potions.Name: Arcane Resonant
potions.Effect: Restore mana equal to target's level.

potions.Name: Vitality Absolute (Lover's Kiss)
potions.Effect: Restore health equal to 2× target level.

potions.Name: Nestivazi (Knockout Black)
potions.Effect: Target sleeps until sunrise or taking more than 3 damage. All signs of life are unreadable.

potions.Name: Vanolazi
potions.Effect: Set all proficiencies below 2 to 2 for 4 turns.

potions.Name: Charging Resonant
potions.Effect: Remove Slow. Gain +1 Reaction, +4 Reflex, +3 Range, +2 Aim, +2 Finesse, +2 Tinkering, +2 Movement for 2 scenes.

potions.Name: Dranolavs
potions.Effect: Casts Inferno Pulse when used. Drink: cast normally. Throw: cast at impact in direction. Destroyed: affects all adjacent tiles. Each dose triggers separately.

potions.Name: Onroaclorialis
potions.Effect: Changes color of target or object. Color chosen at brewing. Can recolor potions without altering effects.

potions.Name: Chuonvilianes
potions.Effect: Cannot hold items. Become slippery terrain and treat all terrain as slippery. Can fit into spaces 1 size smaller. Gain +2 Armor.

potions.Name: Omnistatitz (Booster Shot)
potions.Effect: Gain +2 to all base attributes for 2 minutes.

potions.Name: Thorinalak
potions.Effect: Amplify voice or object's sound to extreme levels.

potions.Name: Zealicious
potions.Effect: Enter Rage. Can go below 0 HP. If still below 0 when Rage ends, die; otherwise fall asleep.

potions.Name: Vanaglue (Mind Expander)
potions.Effect: Apply Stoned for 2 hours. Auto-fail reality checks and hallucinate.

potions.Name: Amponorada
potions.Effect: Next spell deals double damage; caster takes half that damage.

potions.Name: Atherenium
potions.Effect: Upcast spells up to +2 levels higher for one turn.

potions.Name: Ceralevatum
potions.Effect: Restore mana equal to current Speed.

potions.Name: Fexalinar
potions.Effect: Spells apply 2 random conditions on hit for 1 minute.

potions.Name: Aravitalum
potions.Effect: Fall slowly and gain immunity to fall damage for 10 minutes.

potions.Name: Ceruzapinar
potions.Effect: Attacks gain +1 target, plus +1 per 2 Speed above base.

potions.Name: Sulkatum
potions.Effect: Shrink target by 1 size for 1 day. -2 Damage, +2 Accuracy.

potions.Name: Bulkatum
potions.Effect: Grow target by 1 size for 1 day. +2 Damage, -2 Accuracy.

potions.Name: Fantomanarum
potions.Effect: Become a ghost for 1 hour; body remains behind.

potions.Name: Arcguardanum
potions.Effect: Convert mana to health. Excess becomes Guard. If no mana: gain +4 Guard.

potions.Name: Zalanarutum
potions.Effect: Next spell deals bonus damage equal to current Guard.

potions.Name: Kinetocarigium
potions.Effect: Gain +5 Speed. Every 2 tiles moved grants 1 Charge. Next turn: discharge to deal damage to adjacent targets.

potions.Name: Galofrigium
potions.Effect: Set movement to 0 for 3 turns. Gain +2 Armor.

potions.Name: Wild Lunge Brew
potions.Effect: Rush 3 tiles. On hit: apply 1 Poison and bonus damage equal to distance traveled.

potions.Name: Second Wind Draft
potions.Effect: Heal half level. Gain +4 Movement and +2 Guard this turn.

potions.Name: Warpavenevrum
potions.Effect: Teleport to last slept location.

potions.Name: Wildaranum
potions.Effect: Random effect (determined by Narrator).

potions.Name: Vexinotoxicum
potions.Effect: Drain Poison within 3 tiles. Heal twice total stacks removed.

potions.Name: Clearitinigum
potions.Effect: Apply 3 Weakened.

potions.Name: Fluxinvitum
potions.Effect: Convert all but 1 Health into Guard.

potions.Name: Zelextrov
potions.Effect: Cannot be disarmed. Cannot use Reactions. Becomes rough terrain.

potions.Name: Zelaflow
potions.Effect: Lose all proficiencies for 10 minutes.

potions.Name: Vitalireferenium
potions.Effect: Next attack heals equal to damage dealt.

potions.Name: Masacrenetum
potions.Effect: Gain Bleed equal to Body score. Lasts 10 minutes.
